data.title: Astrotech Corp (Nasdaq: ASTC) reports fiscal year 2025 financial results as of June 30, 2025 in Austin, Texas.
data.description: Astrotech Corporation, a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ASTC, recently disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year concluding on June 30, 2025. This report was made public from Austin, Texas on September 25, 2025.

data.title: Ana Pinczuk appointed President of Product & Technology at SentinelOne in Mountain View, Calif.
data.description: Ana Pinczuk has been appointed as the President of Product & Technology in Mountain View, California. The appointment is effective immediately.

data.title: Costco surpasses Q4 earnings, revenue estimations with 5.7% increase in comparable sales, reaching $86.16B revenue and $5.87EPS.
data.description: In the latest financial report for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025, Costco Wholesale Corp (NASDAQ: COST) disclosed key figures after markets closed. The membership-based retailer achieved remarkable results. Revenue for the quarter stood at $86.16 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $86.12 billion. Additionally, the company reported adjusted earnings of $5.87 per share for the fourth quarter, outperforming estimates of $5.80 per share. Notably, net sales experienced an 8% increase compared to the same period last year. For further details, the complete article can be accessed at Benzinga.com.

data.title: Granite awarded $39 million contract by USACE for Pajaro River Reach 6 flood risk management project.
data.description: In Watsonville, California, Granite (NYSE:GVA) has secured a significant contract worth around $39 million from the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (USACE) for the completion of Reach 6 within the Pajaro River Flood Risk Management Project. This initiative, spearheaded and financed by USACE, will see the development of Reach 6 marked as a notable inclusion in Granite's third-quarter CAP. This initial phase is part of a larger project consisting of five reaches, focusing on construction activities along Corralitos Creek, a tributary of the Pajaro River.

data.title: REX-Osprey introduces ESK ETF, providing direct exposure to Ethereum and staking rewards; all rewards go to shareholders.
data.description: REX-Osprey introduced the REX-Osprey ETH + Staking ETF (BATS: ESK) as the first 1940 Act ETF in the U.S. providing direct exposure to Ethereum (ETH) and staking rewards. Investors can now engage with Ethereum's proof-of-stake network through this fund, receiving monthly distributions. 100% of staking rewards are given to shareholders. ESK comprises Ethereum staked directly and exchange-traded products staking ETH, offering a cost-efficient, regulated crypto investment option. REX Financial's CEO, Greg King, highlighted that investors using ESK can access Ethereum alongside staking benefits. The companies emphasized that no portion of staking rewards is retained by them.

data.title: Money market fund assets hit all-time high of $7.31 trillion, with a $31.15 billion increase. Govt funds up by $23.62 billion.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, the Investment Company Institute announced that total assets in money market funds rose by $31.15 billion to reach $7.31 trillion. Government funds surged by $23.62 billion during the week. This data reflects a significant growth in money market investments, indicating a strong market performance.

data.title: Chainlink's price predicted to recover to $25-28 in 4-6 weeks despite current bearish trend, with near-term support at $20-22.
data.description: A forecast for the price of LINK suggests a possible increase to the range of $25-28 in the next 4-6 weeks. However, current technical analysis indicates a likelihood of short-term stabilization around the $20-22 support area.

data.title: PrizePicks approved for prediction markets as sports betting leaders enter billion-dollar sector.
data.description: PrizePicks has been approved to launch prediction markets as sports betting giants quickly enter the lucrative billion-dollar industry.

data.title: Weyerhaeuser to release Q3 results on Oct 30, with webcast on Oct 31 at 7 a.m. PT (10 a.m. ET).
data.description: A webcast and conference call are scheduled for October 31 at 7 a.m. PT (10 a.m. ET). On September 25, 2025, Weyerhaeuser Company, trading under NYSE: WY, announced that their third quarter 2025 results will be out on Thursday, October 30 post-market closure. Subsequently, the company will conduct a live webcast and conference as part of its quarterly reporting.

data.title: FMC Corp (NYSE: FMC) to release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 29, 2025, after market close, webcast conference call scheduled.
data.description: Philadelphia-based FMC Corporation (NYSE: FMC) has revealed its plan to unveil its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on October 29, 2025, following the closure of the stock market. The earnings report will be distributed through PR Newswire and can also be accessed on the company's official website at https://investors.fmc.com. Additionally, the corporation will hold...

data.title: AAR Corp (NYSE: AIR) acquires ADI American Distributors, expanding new parts distribution and market share strategy.
data.description: ADI has recently broadened AAR's rapidly expanding new parts distribution, propelling the company's plan to increase market presence. This strategic move was finalized in Wood Dale, Illinois, on September 25, 2025. AAR CORP, renowned for delivering aviation solutions to commercial and government entities, MROs, and OEMs was involved in this expansion. The development aims to amp up market share for both entities.

data.title: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) declares $0.1875 quarterly dividend, payable to shareholders on Oct 16, 2025, and paid on Nov 6, 2025.
data.description: Atlanta - On September 25, 2025, the Board of Directors at Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.1875 per share. Shareholders of record by October 16, 2025, will receive the dividend paid out on November 6, 2025.

data.title: Zimmer Biomet introduces world's first iodine-treated Total Hip Replacement System, preventing infections.
data.description: The iTaperloc® Complete and iG7™ Hip System featuring Iodine Technology have been developed to prevent bacterial adhesion and biofilm formation on implant surfaces, specifically targeting Periprosthetic Joint Infection following total joint replacement procedures. This innovation has been introduced in Warsaw, Indiana on Sept. 25, 2025.

data.title: FSK finishes $400M 6.125% unsecured notes public offering due 2031.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, FS KKR Capital Corp. disclosed the successful completion of its recent offering. The company finalized the issuance of $400 million in total principal amount of its 6.125% unsecured notes due 2031, referred to as the "Notes." This noteworthy development was revealed jointly from Philadelphia and New York, with FS KKR Capital Corp. being listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FSK.

data.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) to announce Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 31 before market open, with conference call set at 9:00 AM ET.
data.description: In North Bethesda, Maryland, on September 25, 2025, Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) disclosed that it will reveal its third quarter financial performance on Friday, October 31, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 9:00 AM ET.
